name: KL Batten 48

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: E94FC86F-36A5-4F41-BD9F-609E66922734

comment: Perfect for the grandest stage and the great outdoors, the powerful KL BATTEN 48 delivers over 46,500 lumens of smooth, even light. The RGBMA LED engine and its homogeneous beam produces natural, full-spectrum light, with a high CRI that looks good on stage and in the studio.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
